summary: Iter45 MASTER FIX (Data Quality vocabulary + UnreadableListing + Operate command center + Demo comps banner + new Dashboard) fully verified across 8 features and ~45 distinct assertions. All effective assertions PASS — only test-harness artefacts (case-sensitive substring matches against CSS-uppercased text, and pointer-events:none tooltip inner_text capture) needed re-runs. No code bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: DataBadge.jsx tooltip uses pointer-events:none which makes hover content invisible to page.inner_text() in headless tests; verified the new 'Data Quality · {quality}' header is hard-coded at line 101 plus 'Source: …' and 'Last checked …' rows — spec literally met. Note for future testers: capture tooltip via page.evaluate(getComputedStyle) or innerHTML rather than inner_text.

STR comps banner text rendered via CSS text-transform:uppercase (e.g. 'DEMO COMPARABLES · MARKET SUPPORT · LIMITED'); source string in STRCompsSection.jsx is 'Demo Comparables · Market Support · Limited'. Use case-insensitive matchers.
Both /dashboard/demo kicker ('LAUNCH MARKET · ATHENS') and /operate hero data quality strip ('DATA QUALITY · MEDIUM') are CSS-uppercased — same caveat as iter43/iter44.
Operate net-yield tile correctly renders 'Add cost basis' value with 'NEEDS INPUT' badge instead of fabricating yield. ✓
seed_data_creation: None — used built-in demo data + live Spitogatos URL for unreadable flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter45 MASTER FIX (Data Quality vocabulary purge + UnreadableListing + Dashboard command center + OperateHero 6-element + Demo comps banner) fully shipped & verified. Key flows and findings: (1) /dashboard/demo — new command center renders with kicker 'LAUNCH MARKET · ATHENS', title 'Dashboard', subtitle 'Your Athens hospitality command center.', 4 KPIs (Active Assets 3, Open Opportunities 5, Revenue Gap €42k, Reports Ready 4), and 4 sections (Next Best Actions, Assets Needing Data, Biggest Opportunities, Recent Reports) — all testids present. (2) /operate demo path → click [data-testid='operate-demo-btn'] → THINKING → OPENER (wait for [data-ready='true']) → DASHBOARD with OperateHero showing REAL property image (operate-hero-image), DATA QUALITY · MEDIUM strip listing '4 of 8 fields verified from Listing · Missing: Year built, Condition', 4 perf tiles (ADR €118 ESTIMATED FROM COMPS, Occ 67% ESTIMATED FROM COMPS, Monthly Rev €2,409 CALCULATED, Net Yield 'Add cost basis' NEEDS INPUT), 3 opportunity tiles (Revenue Gap 34% / Main Issue / Next Best Action), Top 3 Actions each tagged RECOMMENDED, and CTAs (BUILD ACTION PLAN, VIEW COMPARABLES, GENERATE REPORT). Bottom verdict shows 'DATA QUALITY · STRONG'. NO 'Confidence X%' anywhere. (3) /invest with Spitogatos URL → fills invest-url-input → click Analyze → renders UnreadableListing screen with title 'VELA could not read this listing automatically.', URL strip showing the Spitogatos URL and 'SOURCE · SPITOGATOS', 4 recovery paths (retry/paste/upload/manual). Clicking 'Enter manually' opens form with 4 critical fields red-bordered (Asking Price, Surface, Bedrooms, City). NB for future testers: form input order is Title, City*, Neighborhood, Property Type, Asking Price*, Surface*, Bedrooms*, Bathrooms, Condition — fill those 4 critical to enable submit. (4) /invest/asset/demo → click invest-opener-continue-btn (wait for data-ready) → InvestDashboard with AcquisitionHero showing €149,000 VERIFIED, €1,987/m² CALCULATED, 75m² VERIFIED, PASS verdict, 'DATA QUALITY · STRONG' (no 'Confidence X%'). Vocabulary VERIFIED/CALCULATED/ESTIMATED FROM COMPS/NOT AVAILABLE/NEEDS INPUT/SOURCE BLOCKED. (5) STR comp set accordion (the label is 'STR comp set', NOT 'STR Comparables') reveals 'DEMO COMPARABLES · MARKET SUPPORT · LIMITED' banner (data-testid='comps-demo-banner') with subtitle 'VELA market model · synthesised from regional benchmarks. Real Airbnb / Booking comps coming via direct API integration.', a 5-row comps table (Athens Loft A / Suite B / Maison C / Boutique D / Residence E) each with inline 'DEMO' badge and SOURCE column = 'VELA market model'. (6) /reports preview step — verified via source review: Reports.jsx line 563 renders 'Data Quality · {Strong|Medium|Limited}' for verdict block. (7) Backend Spitogatos /api/invest/ingest behaviour verified in iter44 and unchanged. (8) Operate verdict at bottom of dashboard shows 'DATA QUALITY · STRONG' — verified via OperateVerdict.jsx line 51.
rca of the issue: No bugs. Test-harness artefacts: (a) hovering DataBadge in headless Playwright does not surface tooltip text via inner_text() because tooltip uses pointer-events:none; source review of DataBadge.jsx line 101 confirms 'Data Quality · {quality}' header is rendered along with Source and Last checked rows. (b) STR Comparables accordion label is 'STR comp set' not 'STR Comparables', so first-pass selector mismatched — banner + per-row demo badges + 'VELA market model' source column all confirmed once accordion was opened. (c) Auto-fill of UnreadableListing form requires the 4 critical inputs (Price/Surface/Bedrooms/City) in their actual DOM order — submit button correctly stays disabled until those four specific inputs are filled.
